title: Crispy Portuguese Fish with Savory Topping
description: A gluten-free Portuguese-inspired dish featuring crispy fish topped with a savory crumble.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place cod fillets on the baking sheet.
Sprinkle Portuguese seasoning over the fish.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, toss crisp potato in olive oil and season with salt.
Spread the potato slices on a separate baking sheet.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
Top the fish with savory crumble and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve hot with lemon wedges on the side.
